summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No security-sensitive signal was present, no low-signal closeout was allowed, and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked by job frontmatter. Each open PR is useful focused work that needs maintainer technical review or proof review rather than automated closure.

Human maintainer review is required before this useful focused diagnostics PR can advance; it is not a closeout candidate.
Human proof review is required because the PR remains marked needs proof despite passing checks; no close or merge action is allowed.
